description: README lines 605 and 607 both read '### Reject (reviewer requests rework)' -- the heading is emitted twice consecutively, the second immediately followed by the code block. A copy-paste artifact; delete one. Cosmetic but visible in any rendered view (GitHub, docs site) as an empty duplicated section. Audited 2026-05-20.
title: README: duplicate '### Reject' header in Worktree Lifecycle
